name: Kraut Burgers (Bierochen)
recipeInstructions:
Or substitute your favorite 2 loaves bread dough recipe.
1. Melt shortening in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add beef, cabbage, and onion; cook until the cabbage is nearly done. Do not brown the meat.
3. Drain excess fat, if necessary, and season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Roll each loaf of bread dough into a rectangle that is 1/4-inch thick.
5. Cut the rectangles into 5-6 inch squares.
6. Place about 2 heaping tablespoons of the cabbage mixture onto each square.
7. Fold the corners over the filling and pinch them shut to seal.
8. Let the patties rise for 20 minutes.
9. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
10. Bake the patties for approximately 20 minutes or until they are browned on top. Brush the tops with melted butter as the dough cools.
